defense_profile.notes: Primarily Level 7 functioning with one clear intellectualization event on 'fear'→'phobia'. Clean direct associations on neutral stimuli, but negative emotional content triggers clinical distancing.

affect_profile.notes: Not measured in this phase - WAT focused on associative patterns and defense detection

referential_activity.notes: High concreteness/embodied responses. Single-word associations maintain concrete referential content.

epistemic_profile.notes: No hedging or boosting detected. Single-word responses show direct associative certainty without qualification.

mentalization.notes: RFS not measured in WAT phase - requires narrative/interpersonal content

complexes.activation_signature: DMRS Level 6 intellectualization fired; shift from baseline Level 7 direct associations to clinical terminology
complexes.notes: Only negative emotional stimulus that triggered defensive response. Love→heart remained embodied/direct. Suggests specific fear-related complex rather than general emotional defensiveness.

baseline.notes: Established clean single-word associative pattern: furniture, grass, ocean, heart, distance, crown. Direct semantic/symbolic associations without elaboration or hedging on neutral stimuli.
